output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?clubLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q142794 wdt:P54 ?club ; rdfs:label ?clubLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?clubLabel) = 'en')
}
output.result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| clubLabel        |
| ---------------- |
| Neymar (lang:en) |
output.formatted:

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?clubLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q142794 wdt:P54 ?club ; rdfs:label ?clubLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?clubLabel) = 'en')
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| clubLabel        |
| ---------------- |
| Neymar (lang:en) |
